# Sidqly

Sidqly is a premium Islamic operating platform for modern charities, mosques, and Zakat teams.

## Core Capabilities
- Zakat Management & Manual Eligibility
- Qurbani Operations & Vendor Fulfillment
- Ramadan Food Drive Coordination
- Dignity-Safe Proof & Trust System
- QR-Verified Deliveries
- Premium Impact Reporting

## Resources
- [Home](https://sidqly.com/)
- [Features](https://sidqly.com/features)
- [Pricing](https://sidqly.com/pricing)
- [How it Works](https://sidqly.com/how-it-works)
- [FAQs](https://sidqly.com/faqs)
- [Help Center](https://sidqly.com/help)
- [Brand Identity](https://sidqly.com/brand)

## Brand Identity
Sidqly uses a modern Islamic-inspired brand identity built around trust, proof, dignity, and clear impact. The brand combines deep green, emerald, soft green, warm gold, deep navy, and warm ivory to communicate amanah, transparency, professionalism, and modern operations. The logo mark represents Islamic heritage, verified proof, protected dignity, and measurable impact.

## Contact
- Sales & Support: team@sidqly.com
